module.name: mark
module.description: Highlighter-pen highlight for a span of text. The body is the text to highlight (may contain spaces, commas and inline Markdown) and it renders inline so it flows mid-sentence.
module.aiSpec:
HIGHLIGHT (marker-pen) a span of text to draw attention to it. Although declared as a block module it renders INLINE (a single <span>), so it flows mid-sentence inside a paragraph. The BODY (between the directive and <!-- @end -->) is the text to highlight; it may contain spaces, commas and inline Markdown. Not for: full callout/attention boxes (use @callout) or code (use a fenced code block). Parameters: • color — highlight background color (default #fde68a, a soft yellow). • textcolor — text color inside the highlight (default: blank = theme text color). • radius — CSS corner radius of the highlight, e.g. 3px or 0.4em (default: blank = 3px). • bold — render the highlighted text in bold (true/false, default false).
<!-- @mark color: #bfdbfe, bold: true --> the key result <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Highlight color
param.desc: Background color of the marker highlight.

param.name: textcolor
param.label: Text color
param.desc: Text color inside the highlight; blank keeps the theme text color.

param.name: radius
param.label: Corner radius
param.desc: CSS corner radius of the highlight (e.g. 3px, 0.4em); blank = default 3px.

param.name: bold
param.label: Bold text
param.desc: Render the highlighted text in bold.

snippet.label: Highlight
snippet.description: Highlighted (marked) text. Body = the text to highlight.

snippet.label: Bold highlight
snippet.text: <!-- @mark color: #bfdbfe, bold: true --> the key result <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Highlight with a custom color and bold text.
